response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff-level software engineer with strong expertise in TypeScript, microservices, and technical leadership, he falls significantly short of the required 8+ years of experience building AI-driven solutions. His resume shows only recent, brief exposure to GenAI infrastructure and lacks essential core technologies like Python, Vector databases, and RAG architectures required for this role.
strengths: Extensive Staff-level engineering experience with a strong track record of technical leadership, open-source contribution, and mentoring.
Deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, AWS, and building high-throughput microservices and data platforms.
Recent relevant exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, agentic workflows, and Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers.
concerns: Critically lacks the required 8+ years of experience developing and shipping production-grade AI solutions.
No demonstrated experience with Python, Vector databases, or Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures.
Lacks explicit customer-facing technical discovery and consulting experience needed for a Forward Deployed role.
